ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Full name of the entity (e.g., town, city) */,
  "initials" TEXT /* Initials used to represent the entity */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the entity's planning or projects */,
  "npo_involvement" INTEGER /* Indicates involvement of non-profit organizations */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., town, city) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the entity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development plan */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity that this plan belongs to */,
  "dbplans" INTEGER /* Count of database plans approved for this entity */,
  "dcplans" INTEGER /* Count of design and construction plans approved for this entity */,
  "csplans" INTEGER /* Count of community service plans approved for this entity */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the development plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_plans_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plan associated with this allocation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated in dollars */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "allocation_type" TEXT /* Type of allocation (e.g., funds, resources) */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who allocated the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES development_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project status entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plan associated with this status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES development_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_profit_organizations" (
  "npo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-profit organization */,
  "npo_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-profit organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of services provided by the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("npo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "npo_involvement" (
  "involvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each involvement entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plan that the NPO is involved in */,
  "npo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the non-profit organization */,
  "involvement_type" TEXT /* Type of involvement (e.g., funding, resources) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("involvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npo_involvement_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES development_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_npo_involvement_npo_id FOREIGN KEY ("npo_id") REFERENCES non_profit_organizations ("npo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plan */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, feedback) */,
  "commentedBy" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES development_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, reviewer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
